name: tidepool-web
description: Tidepool — distro-first change intelligence service (TypeScript): comprehensive per-distro package lists aggregated from each distro's information sources, GPG-verified where the distro signs.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:server && mkdir -p coverage && node --test --enable-source-maps --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='**/server/src/**' --test-coverage-lines=65 --test-coverage-branches=70 --test-coverage-functions=68 --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=coverage/lcov.info 'server/dist/server/test/*.test.js'
